title: Craft Some Elytra!
description: A simple little mod that adds an item called a "Synthetic Elytron," two of which (and a Netherite ingot) can be crafted into an Elytra.
body:
End ships... Who needs 'em? You certainly don't, not anymore at least. Enter, the Synthetic Elytron! With two of these, and a Netherite bar to join them, you can make yourself an Elytra, without even needing to build an awkward Cobblestone staircase to one of those *icky* ships. The recipes are simple:

**Synthetic Elytron:**

2 Phantom Membranes + 2 End Rods + 1 Netherite bar, in the approximate shape of a wing (see Gallery)

*Note: the recipe can be flipped such that the End Rods are on the left as well*

**Elytra:**

(Shapelessly)

2 Synthetic Elytrons (Elytra, whatever) + 1 Netherite Bar
